items.label: Mop comments
items.description: Remove this comment and all child comments. This might take a few seconds to run.

items.label: Mop post comments
items.description: Remove all comments of this post. This might take a few seconds to run.

items.label: View ModPilot X-Ray
items.description: See risk score, author profile, and text signals for this post.

items.label: View ModPilot X-Ray
items.description: See risk score, author profile, and text signals for this comment.

items.label: Claim for review
items.description: Mark this item as being reviewed by you.

items.label: Claim for review
items.description: Mark this item as being reviewed by you.

items.label: Team Review Queue
items.description: See all items flagged for team review.

items.label: Exit ModPilot Baseline Mode
items.description: Stop observation mode and start scoring immediately.

riskThreshold.label: Risk score threshold (1-10)
riskThreshold.helpText: Items scoring at or above this value are added to the high-risk queue.

autoSnoozeBelow.label: Auto-snooze score below (0 = off)
autoSnoozeBelow.helpText: Items scoring at or below this value are automatically snoozed.

claimTtlMinutes.label: Claim expiry in minutes
claimTtlMinutes.helpText: How long a mod's claim on an item is held before expiring.

teamReviewThreshold.label: Team review votes required for auto-action
teamReviewThreshold.helpText: Set to 0 to disable auto-action on team votes.

digestWebhookUrl.label: Discord webhook URL (optional)
digestWebhookUrl.helpText: If set, the daily digest will be posted to this Discord webhook.

baselineDays.label: Baseline observation days (0 = off)
baselineDays.helpText: Number of days to observe before scoring becomes active.
